title: Hallows Eve
description: This Mod Adds Fun Decor And Weapons Based Off The Amazing Day Known As Halloween
body:
Hallows Eve Is A Mod That Adds A Lot Of Things Based Of The Amazing Day Known As Halloween

This Mod Includes:
- New Blocks
- A New Armor Set
- A New Crop
- New Weapons
- New Food Items
- A New Effect
- And Many Silly Secrets

New Weapons!
- Bone Greatsword
- Reaper's Scythe

New Food Items!
- Candy
- Candy Corn
- Caramel
- Caramel Apple

New Crop!
- The Turnip Crop Can Now Be Farmed By Breaking Grass You Can Get Its Seeds!

New Blocks!
- New Carved Pumpkin Types As Well As Jack O Lantern Types
- Carved Melon And Turnip


(The Rest Of The Features Youll Have To Figure Out Yourself The Advancements May Help You If You Need...)


For Any Issues Or Suggestions Come Into Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs)!
